title: ICAT Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ICAT Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? ICAT Holdings Services in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ICAT Holdings Services:
ICAT Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT Holdings Services!
